notes: Transitions to jab 2 as early as frame 7.
Transitions to jab 3 as early as frame 8 and rapid jab as early as frame 7
Explodes next frame after making contact. Can shoot the can every 12 frames. Can generates on frame 1. After eighth shot, can will auto explode after 76 frames but can still be manipulated.
Can only detonate when clay is immobile or rebounding after a hit. "Missed shots" occur on frame 4.

Can cancel into air dodge or attacks as early as frame 51. Cancels will avoid the special fall state and landing lag (This is technically only mostly true. For more detailed information, check out theAir Dodge Landing Lag Glitch on Smash Wikivia@CourageRatVA.)

move: Wild Gunman, Leader in brown coat

landing_lag: Total frames includes 13 frames of hitlag.
